summary: Made one surgical continuity edit in the opening, changing the wallet-loss reference from the day before to the night before so the chapter points more directly back to chapter 13's closing cash-pressure beat. No exit change was needed; the existing shut-out image already hands off cleanly to the chapter 15 boundary opening. No style-bible example_lines were present to replace.
edits: Retimed the opening wallet line to point back to the previous night's money pressure.
